Rarity: UNIQUE The Taming Prismatic Ring League: Domination, Nemesis Catalyst: Turbulent CatalystQuality: 20 Variant: Pre 3.0.0 Variant: Pre 3.25.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 LevelReq: 30 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:1}+(8-10)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_elemental,attack}{variant:1}15% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {tags:jewellery_elemental,attack}{variant:2}30% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {tags:jewellery_resistance}{variant:1}{range:0.5}+(10-15)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_resistance}{variant:2,3}{range:0.5}+(20-30)% to all Elemental Resistances {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:1}15% increased Elemental Damage {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:2}30% increased Elemental Damage {variant:1}5% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite {variant:2,3}10% chance to Freeze, Shock and Ignite {variant:1}10% increased Damage per Freeze, Shock and Ignite on Enemy {variant:2}20% increased Damage with Hits and Ailments per Freeze, Shock and Ignite on Enemy {tags:jewellery_elemental}{variant:3}{range:1}(30-40)% increased Elemental Damage with Hits and Ailments for each type of Elemental Ailment on Enemy

Rarity: UNIQUE Ancestral Vision Viridian Jewel Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}+(5-10) to Dexterity Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value

Rarity: UNIQUE Thread of Hope Crimson Jewel Variant: Small Ring Variant: Medium Ring Variant: Large Ring Variant: Very Large Ring Variant: Massive Ring (Uber) Selected Variant: 3 Radius: Variable Implicits: 0 {variant:1}Only affects Passives in Small Ring {variant:2}Only affects Passives in Medium Ring {variant:3}Only affects Passives in Large Ring {variant:4}Only affects Passives in Very Large Ring {variant:5}Only affects Passives in Massive Ring Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree {range:0.976}-(20-10)% to all Elemental Resistances

Rarity: UNIQUE The Light of Meaning Prismatic Jewel Variant: Life Variant: Energy Shield Variant: Mana Variant: Armour Variant: Evasion Rating Variant: Attributes Variant: Global Crit Chance Variant: Physical Damage Variant: Lightning Damage Variant: Cold Damage Variant: Fire Damage Variant: Chaos Damage Variant: Chaos Resistance Selected Variant: 13 Radius: Large Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 {variant:1}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to Maximum Life {variant:2}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 3% increased Energy Shield {variant:3}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +5 to Maximum Mana {variant:4}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 7% increased Armour {variant:5}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 7% increased Evasion Rating {variant:6}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +2 to all Attributes {variant:7}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 5% Increased Global Critical Strike Chance {variant:8}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Physical Damage {variant:9}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Lightning Damage {variant:10}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Cold Damage {variant:11}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Fire Damage {variant:12}Passive Skills in Radius also grant 6% increased Chaos Damage {variant:13}Passive Skills in Radius also grant +4% to Chaos Resistance

Rarity: UNIQUE Headhunter Leather Belt League: Nemesis Catalyst: Fertile CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 1 {tags:life}{range:1}+(25-40) to maximum Life {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.805}+(40-55) to Strength {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.817}+(40-55) to Dexterity {tags:life}{range:0.89}+(50-60) to maximum Life {range:0.5}(20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Rare monsters When you Kill a Rare monster, you gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

Rarity: MAGIC Chemist's Silver Flask of the Cheetah Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.137}FlaskChargesUsed5 Suffix: {range:0.842}FlaskBuffMovementSpeedWhileHealing3 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 0 26% reduced Charges per use 14% increased Movement Speed during Effect

Rarity: RARE New Item Large Cluster Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableArcingShot__ Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableFueltheFight Suffix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableMartialProwess Suffix: None CatalystQuality: 20 Cluster Jewel Skill: affliction_bow_damage Cluster Jewel Node Count: 8 LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 8 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Damage with Bows Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Damage Over Time with Bow Skills 1 Added Passive Skill is Arcing Shot 1 Added Passive Skill is Fuel the Fight 1 Added Passive Skill is Martial Prowess

Rarity: RARE perfect Recombinator bow Spine Bow Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.648}LocalAddedColdDamageTwoHand10 Prefix: {range:0.648}LocalAddedFireDamageTwoHand10 Prefix: {range:0.789}LocalAddedLightningDamageTwoHand10 Suffix: {range:0.937}LocalCriticalStrikeChance6 Suffix: {range:0.894}LocalIncreasedAttackSpeed5 Suffix: None CatalystQuality: 20 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-G-G-G-G-G LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}1% increased Attack Speed per 8% Quality Adds 204 to 371 Fire Damage Adds 185 to 331 Cold Damage Adds 36 to 619 Lightning Damage 19% increased Attack Speed 38% increased Critical Strike Chance {tags:unveiled_mod,damage}{crafted}{range:1}(8-10)% chance to deal Double Damage

Rarity: RARE High Budget defensive Ring Vermillion Ring Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.419}WeaponElementalDamage5 Prefix: {range:0.493}IncreasedLife7 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.204}AllResistances4 Suffix: {range:0.891}Strength8 Suffix: {range:0.926}IncreasedAccuracyNew4 Catalyst: Fertile CatalystQuality: 20 LevelReq: 80 Implicits: 1 {tags:resource,life}{range:0.951}(5-7)% increased maximum Life +49 to Strength +343 to Accuracy Rating +128 to maximum Life +12% to all Elemental Resistances 39% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{crafted}{range:1}Non-Channelling Skills have -(7-6) to Total Mana Cost

Input.name: customMods
Input.string: To account for Returning Projectile DPS: Lightning arrow deals 33% more damage
